codeReview.summary: Implementation fully satisfies VAL-API-001..005. Clean separation of concerns with dedicated resolveUltraPlanTuning and resolveGroundedSearchTuning functions. Preset-specific defaults (browser_only elevated vs legacy) are correctly applied. Explicit override preservation with sibling fallback works correctly. Independent flag toggling is properly implemented. Malformed payload rejection validates both type and unknown fields. Test coverage is comprehensive.

sharedStateObservations.observation: No convention gaps. Implementation follows existing patterns in config.ts for resolver functions and webhook validation.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: resolveUltraPlanTuning/resolveGroundedSearchTuning follow the same defensive typeof guard pattern used elsewhere in config.ts

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker followed the discovery-integration-worker skill procedure correctly. Added failing tests first (red), then implemented minimal changes to pass (green).
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript skeleton shows structured approach; handoff verification.commandsRun confirms test-first workflow

sharedStateObservations.observation: No new services or commands introduced. Standard npm/node TypeScript strip-types test runner used.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Verification commands use existing test:browser-use-discovery and test:repo scripts from services.yaml

summary: PASS - Feature fully implemented and tested. VAL-API-001 (browser_only elevated defaults), VAL-API-002 (explicit override preservation), VAL-API-003 (independent flag toggles), VAL-API-004 (malformed payload rejection), and VAL-API-005 (preset isolation) are all correctly implemented with comprehensive test coverage. No blocking issues found.
